description: Still evaluating, but trying to better understand where the Bots can be helpful in a learning environment
author: Kevin M.
pros: The visual editor is a nice addition, easy to implement on linux, just a few commands to get started
cons: While the visual editor is nice to have, there is too little documentation on building a bot. The app is updated quite frequently, but the documentation trails way behind. The only way that we learned to build a bot is by following along a YouTube tutorial from 2 years ago. Wish there were more walk-throughs.
author_duration: Used the software for: 1-2 years

review_title: Botpress is a Great Way to Get Started in Chatbots
author: Max H.
pros: I like that it was easy and free to get started. They have a generous free plan, so it's easy to explore and test its capabilities.
cons: It would be a huge help to have more templates available as a starting point. The software is intuitive, but for a beginner it's hard to sift through all options to find the best way to accomplish the task at hand. I think having more templates would be a great way to learn options and best practices.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: A great tool for creating custom Ai chatbots with ease
description: Overall, I had a great experience, building a chatbot for the very first time, despite not being technically inclined
author: Wisdom B.
pros: I really like how flexible and user-friendly it is, especially for non-technical users. The visual flow builder makes it easy to design chatbots without deep coding skills
cons: Sometimes it takes time to get used to the interface, and setting up advanced Features can be a bit technical for beginners
author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months

description: It's not that bad, everything has its own flaws but I would recommend it to anyone. The Botpress YouTube channel is also great for explaining the User Interface
author: Boneficious M.
pros: It's User Interface is really designed to accommodate even those that are new to vibe coding .it allows continued improvement
cons: The small free tier doesn't allow you to do anything of any use. It would be better if the free tier allowed more that 500 messages and events
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Jean-Francois F.
pros: After evaluating multiple options, we found Botpress to be the ideal solution. This tool stands out for its user-friendliness, ease of use, and efficiency. The combination of managing conversation flows with pre-configured cards and AI provides effective control and remarkable flexibility. Moreover, the integration with GPT is highly impressive and seamlessly incorporated into the tool. In addition, the support for learning the tool is robust. The available documentation, active Discord channel for inquiries and discussions, and comprehensive YouTube training channel together create a well-designed ecosystem around the tool.
cons: While the documentation is accessible and easy to consult, there are areas for improvement, such as the inclusion of default values for certain configurations or variables. Our tests helped us identify these, but the search in the documentation did not.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Jon David C.
pros: We loved the low cost and east of deployment. We were looking at about a half a dozen different chatbot platforms. We had narrowed the choices down to two open source chatbot platforms because we did not want to be locked in to anyone companies technology. We did not expect much support but Botpress was a nice surprise. They have a very active and supportive community along with weekly office hours and Discord server which was a great resource.
cons: There wasn't really anything not to love about Botpress. The initial startup was a bit confusing because we had been using other open source platforms and weren't expecting an already setup cloud platform but that was a wonderful surprise.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Kamsi O.
pros: I like that Botpress has a low-code interface that makes it easy to create and manage chatbots, with little or no coding skills. I can use the visual flow editor, the built-in templates, and the drag-and-drop widgets to design conversational flows and user interfaces in minutes.
cons: I dislike that Botpress has a steep learning curve, especially for beginners and non-technical users. The platform has a lot of features and options, which can be overwhelming and confusing at first. I have to spend some time and effort to learn how to use the platform effectively and efficiently.
author_duration: Used the software for: 1-2 years

description: Botpress is a great platform with a strong community of developers around the world that are welcoming and open to sharing their time, resources, and elevating best practices among bot builders.
author: Carolyn M.
pros: Botpress offers an economical and code-friendly low-code platform that allows for a range of user skill and experience to begin building scalable applications quickly.
cons: Ambiguity on feature releases / project update timelines. They're certainly not the only company that ships features without a schedule posted to the public, but it's always nice to have a know in advance when new bells and whistles are coming!
author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months

review_title: Buen contenido para personalizar un bot
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Me gustó que tenga variables que detecten automáticamente si es fecha o si es un nombre de persona
cons: Que no obtenga respuestas de una api por medio de get
author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months

review_title: An excellent Bot framework that can be deployed totally on premise.
author: Abhishek Raj S.
pros: I have evaluated a dozen other chatbot frameworks but choose to go with Botpress. One of the main things which I like about Botpress is that it can be deployed on-prem and none of the data leaves your organization. It can be customized as you like and as they said, it's like a WordPress for chatbots. Recently Botpress community support started growing.
cons: There is a learning curve to it. The documentation/blog can be improved to help customers stay motivated.
author_duration: Used the software for: 1-2 years

description: Best open source solution available on the market
